title: Clever LMS Connect Certification Guide
heading: Clever LMS Connect Certification Guide
content:
> ## ❗️
> 
> Clever Complete Agreement Required
> 
> This feature is included with a Clever Complete subscription. Sign up [here](https://www.clever.com/developer-signup) or email your Application Success Manager to learn more.

> ## 🚧
> 
> v3.1 Only
> 
> LMS Connect API endpoints are only available on v3.1 of the Clever API. If you are interested in getting started with LMS Connect, reach out to your Application Success Manager (for existing partners) or to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#610011110d08020015080e0f4c080f15041304121521020d041704134f020e0c).

> ## ❗️
> 
> This product is only available to existing Secure Sync partners.
> 
> To learn more about Secure Sync, please review [this documentation](/docs/district-getting-started).

# 

Table of Contents

[](#table-of-contents)

[How Long Does it Take?](/docs/clever-secure-sync-certification-guide-copy#how-long-does-it-take)  
[Checklist](/docs/clever-secure-sync-certification-guide-copy#checklist)  
[Ready to Submit for Certification?](/docs/clever-secure-sync-certification-guide-copy#ready-to-submit-for-certification)

* * *

# 

How Long Does it Take?

[](#how-long-does-it-take)

The time it takes to build an LMS Connect integration with Clever varies depending on your business needs, data model, and technical constraints. We typically allow 1 - 2 weeks to complete the certification after submission.

### 

Certification Process

[](#certification-process)

1.  **Build Integration**: Complete your Clever LMS Connect integration.
2.  **Submit for Certification**: Submit your integration for certification review.
3.  **Review**: Our Partner Engineering team will review your integration in accordance with our Certification requirements.
4.  **Results and Next Steps**: Receive an email with your certification results and recommended next steps. If needed, we will schedule a call to discuss your integration in greater detail.

* * *

# 

Checklist

[](#checklist)

Ensure your integration meets the requirements listed below.

### 

Integration Requirements

[](#integration-requirements)

-   Assignment creation
-   Assignment updates
-   Assignment deletion
-   Submission updates (including different states \["created", "submitted", "returned", "reclaimed"\])
-   (Optional) LTI support

* * *

# 

Ready to Submit for Certification?

[](#ready-to-submit-for-certification)

Please reach out to your Application Success Manager for a link to our certification form if you did not receive one during your Onboarding call.
